data.title: Autoliv Surges Despite Mixed Q3 Results: Chinese Market Mix Drags  Performance
data.description: Autoliv shares rose despite missing Q3 EPS expectations due to weak global light vehicle production, while the company adjusts its 2024 sales growth forecast to 1%.
